description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a simple, modern design. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with multiple large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entrance features a glass-paneled door flanked by windows, and the layout includes distinct rooms such as a kitchen, living area, and bathroom, visible through the open plan. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the window arrangement is mostly linear and functional. The interior appears to be partially furnished, with visible kitchen appliances and cabinetry. The structure is compact, with no visible porch or veranda, and the overall design emphasizes practicality and efficient use of space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light-colored exterior, and large windows. The layout is compact and functional, with visible interior rooms and a glass-paneled front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a glass-paneled door and several large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the kitchen area with visible appliances and cabinetry, and a single window.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and a back door, with a clear view of the interior room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a secondary entrance and more windows, with a glimpse into the bathroom area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
